vulnerability.reference: Low‑skill, freely available face‑swapping apps remove technical barriers, making non‑consensual image fabrication trivially easy.
vulnerability.generated: Public availability of facial images and absent detection tools leave individuals unable to refute or prevent false synthetic depictions.

impact.reference: Victims experience psychological distress, reputational damage, and privacy violations when fabricated compromising images spread online.
impact.generated: Victims face reputational ruin, psychological trauma, and blackmail; societal trust in visual evidence collapses.

dose_response.reference: Accessible face-swapping apps leveraging high-fidelity synthesis allow easy creation of non-consensual compromising images, causing psychological distress and reputational damage when disseminated.
dose_response.generated: Indistinguishable synthetic imagery from high-fidelity human image synthesis, through non-consensual face-swapping of individuals, exploits public facial images and missing detection tools, preventing refutation of false depictions, leading to reputational ruin, psychological trauma, blackmail, and collapse of trust in visual evidence.
